shortDescription: Renovated 4-bedroom semi-detached in Parkdale with open-concept layout and finished lower level.
fullDescription: Welcome to 55 Elm Grove Avenue in the vibrant Parkdale neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 4 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
